chapter_1.title: Chapter I Complete - Ashen Echo
chapter_1.body: The campfire reflects on broken wings. You can preserve your light, or bargain with darkness to survive deeper floors.

chapter_2.title: Chapter II Complete - Furnace of Faith
chapter_2.body: Steel and prayer clash in your chest. A righteous path grants grace; a darker path grants ruthless power.

chapter_3.title: Chapter III Complete - Frozen Covenant
chapter_3.body: Silence follows your steps before the final gate. One last vow will shape your ending.

chapter_1.title: Chapter I - Forsaken Catacombs
chapter_1.subtitle: Survive and establish momentum
chapter_1.hazard_hint: Water flow and spore clouds drain position and stamina.

chapter_2.title: Chapter II - Ember Foundry
chapter_2.subtitle: Pressure increases with heat
chapter_2.hazard_hint: Lava pools punish greed. Conveyor lanes can push you into danger.

chapter_3.title: Chapter III - Frost Cathedral
chapter_3.subtitle: Control pace and spacing
chapter_3.hazard_hint: Ice reduces control. Frostbite buildup can trigger heavy periodic damage.

chapter_4.title: Chapter IV - Void Bastion
chapter_4.subtitle: Final approach
chapter_4.hazard_hint: Void corruption ramps damage over time. Keep gauges low between fights.

chapter_1.title: Ruined Shrine
chapter_1.body: An ancient shrine still flickers with weak light. You may pray for grace or take the relic by force.

chapter_effect.title: Sanctified Ward
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: hazard pressure down, armor and damage up.

chapter_effect.title: Abyss Hunger
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: stronger offense but heavier hazards.

chapter_1.title: Lost Survivor
chapter_1.body: A wounded survivor begs for help. Your supplies are limited.

chapter_effect.title: Cold Detour
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: faster spawn pressure, extra gains.

chapter_1.title: Afterglow Reflection
chapter_1.body: The shrine mirrors an ending you once reached. The memory changes your next steps.

chapter_effect.title: Afterglow Grace
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: stable pacing and stronger defense.

chapter_2.title: Overheated Forge
chapter_2.body: A demon forge still burns. You can temper your weapon or salvage valuables.

chapter_effect.title: Tempered Edge
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: lower hazard pressure and better control.

chapter_effect.title: Greedy Slag
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: more pressure in exchange for burst damage.

chapter_2.title: Ash Arena
chapter_2.body: A cursed arena offers reward for blood. Entering stirs the abyss.

chapter_effect.title: Arena Frenzy
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: rapid spawns and stronger weapon output.

chapter_effect.title: Calm Breath
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: lower incoming pressure and safer hazards.

chapter_3.title: Whispers in Ice
chapter_3.body: Frozen whispers reveal fragments of your origin. Listening too long may scar your soul.

chapter_effect.title: Frozen Focus
chapter_effect.desc: 2 rooms: stable movement and reduced hazard burden.

chapter_effect.title: Whisper Mania
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: high damage with severe corruption pressure.

chapter_4.title: Threshold of Dawn
chapter_4.body: At the final threshold, a silent choir offers one last boon before the abyssal throne.

chapter_effect.title: Last Benediction
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: lower threat and steady holy momentum.

chapter_effect.title: Last Ruin
chapter_effect.desc: 3 rooms: extreme power with punishing pressure.

memory_ch1_boss.title: Fragment I: Chapel Ash
memory_ch1_boss.text: In ruined sanctuaries, your wings once shielded thousands.

memory_ch2_boss.title: Fragment II: Furnace Oath
memory_ch2_boss.text: You forged holy steel, then watched it melt in betrayal.

memory_ch3_boss.title: Fragment III: Frozen Prayer
memory_ch3_boss.text: Your final prayer froze midair when the heavens turned away.

memory_ch4_boss.title: Fragment IV: Broken Crown
memory_ch4_boss.text: At the edge of oblivion, you learned that mercy and ruin share one throne.

memory_ch1_route_vanguard.title: Fragment V: Vanguard Oath
memory_ch1_route_vanguard.text: You chose the shield wall first, teaching survivors to endure before they could strike.

memory_ch1_route_raider.title: Fragment VI: Raider Ember
memory_ch1_route_raider.text: You marched ahead of the line, seizing relic fuel before despair could claim the camp.

memory_ch2_route_vanguard.title: Fragment VII: Forge Vigil
memory_ch2_route_vanguard.text: At the furnace gates, your watch never broke; every blade was tempered under your vow.

memory_ch2_route_raider.title: Fragment VIII: Ash Requisition
memory_ch2_route_raider.text: You stripped the foundry bare in one night and armed the weak with stolen fire.

memory_ch3_route_vanguard.title: Fragment IX: Cathedral Bulwark
memory_ch3_route_vanguard.text: In frozen halls, your stance held the corridor while the last pilgrims escaped.

memory_ch3_route_raider.title: Fragment X: Whisper Bargain
memory_ch3_route_raider.text: You listened to the ice and took its price, trading warmth for power that never sleeps.

memory_ch4_route_vanguard.title: Fragment XI: Dusk Bastion
memory_ch4_route_vanguard.text: At the final breach you held the broken gate, buying one last dawn for the camp behind you.

memory_ch4_route_raider.title: Fragment XII: Crown of Ash
memory_ch4_route_raider.text: You struck first at the abyssal throne and left with spoils that burned even in silence.

memory_ch2_event_forge.title: Fragment XIII: Furnace Ledger
memory_ch2_event_forge.text: Every ingot had a name; every blade you raised was a promise you refused to forget.

memory_ch3_event_sanctum.title: Fragment XIV: Silent Choir
memory_ch3_event_sanctum.text: The frozen sanctum sang without voices, and you learned to read its hymns in fractured light.

memory_ch4_event_void.title: Fragment XV: Empty Coronation
memory_ch4_event_void.text: When the void offered a crown, you answered with steel and wrote your oath into the dark.

memory_meta_campfire.title: Fragment XVI: Campfire Testament
memory_meta_campfire.text: Between runs, embers carried your old vows; each return sharpened the path you chose to keep.

memory_ch4_route_vanguard_ii.title: Fragment XVII: Last Bulwark
memory_ch4_route_vanguard_ii.text: When the abyss breached the final ward, you planted your banner and held until dawn split the smoke.

memory_ch4_route_raider_ii.title: Fragment XVIII: Spoils of Dusk
memory_ch4_route_raider_ii.text: You returned from the shattered throne with cursed relics and a silence no priest could cleanse.

memory_ch2_event_forge_ii.title: Fragment XIX: Tempered Debt
memory_ch2_event_forge_ii.text: Each strike at the anvil paid an old debt; each spark was a vow to those you failed to protect.

memory_ch3_event_sanctum_ii.title: Fragment XX: Frostbound Psalm
memory_ch3_event_sanctum_ii.text: In the frozen nave, hymns traced your blade and taught you where mercy ends and duty begins.

memory_ch4_event_void_ii.title: Fragment XXI: Throne Without Name
memory_ch4_event_void_ii.text: The void called you by your oldest name, and you answered with steel before the echo could root.

memory_meta_reliquary.title: Fragment XXII: Reliquary Oath
memory_meta_reliquary.text: Back at camp, the reliquary glowed with stolen starlight, reminding you that every run rewrites your covenant.

nar_ending_redeem.title: Ending: REDEEM
nar_ending_redeem.story: You rise with broken wings healed by grace. The abyss closes, but your oath remains.
nar_ending_redeem.epilogue_first_unlock: At dawn, the camp bells ring again. Survivors whisper your true name and the first altar rekindles.
nar_ending_redeem.epilogue_repeat: The redeemed path returns in clearer detail; each cycle reveals another vow you once forgot.

nar_ending_fall.title: Ending: FALL
nar_ending_fall.story: You wear the void as a crown. Salvation is denied, and power becomes your final prayer.
nar_ending_fall.epilogue_first_unlock: Ash storms kneel at your steps. The old sanctums seal their gates as your shadow claims the horizon.
nar_ending_fall.epilogue_repeat: The fall deepens with each return; the abyss no longer tempts you, it answers you.

nar_ending_balance.title: Ending: BALANCE
nar_ending_balance.story: Neither halo nor abyss claims you. You walk the narrow dusk, guarding both worlds.
nar_ending_balance.epilogue_first_unlock: In twilight archives, both hymns and curses answer your command. The borderlands breathe in peace.
nar_ending_balance.epilogue_repeat: Balance becomes sharper with every cycle; you begin to see hidden routes between mercy and ruin.
